root.rep_text: -> รายงานเคลื่อนไหวหุ้น

loan_type.text: ประเภทเงินกู้

root.sql:
SELECT pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_payment_date, 'dd/mm/yyyy') AS loan_payment_date ,sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.item_type_code ,sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.principal_balance ,sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.interest_amout ,SC_LON_M_LOAN_CARD.MEMBERSHIP_NO ,SC_LON_M_LOAN_CARD.loan_contract_no ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ,sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.payment_amount ,sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item.sign_status ,sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.share_coll_amount as detail_share_coll_amount ,SC_LON_M_LOAN_CARD.SHARE_COLL_AMOUNT ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name ,SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP.member_group_control ,pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP.member_group_control) as member_group_control_name FROM SC_LON_M_LOAN_CARD ,sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail ,SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item WHERE (sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no = SC_LON_M_LOAN_CARD.loan_contract_no) AND (SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no) AND (SC_LON_M_LOAN_CARD.MEMBERSHIP_NO = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) AND (sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item.item_type_code = sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.item_type_code) AND (sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.STATUS = '0') --AND (trim(SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP.member_group_control) = trim(:as_group)) --AND (sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.STATUS = '0') --AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_payment_date BETWEEN to_date('20/08/2025', 'dd/mm/yyyy') AND to_date('20/08/2025', 'dd/mm/yyyy') ) --AND (SC_LON_M_LOAN_CARD.LOAN_TYPE = :as_loan_type) --AND (SC_LON_M_LOAN_CARD.contact_status IN (:as_constat)) --sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.status is null or /*WHERE*/
order by SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP.member_group_control ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no , SC_LON_M_LOAN_CARD.MEMBERSHIP_NO ,SC_LON_M_LOAN_CARD.loan_contract_no asc
